name: Potatoes with Apple, Onions, and Mint
recipeIngredient: Cooked and peeled potatoes, boiled in 1 1/2 inch cubes
Tart green apples, less than the potatoes, peeled and diced smaller than the potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a pan.
2. Cook onions until soft.
3. Add potatoes and cook until they are crispy on the outside.
4. Add apples and mint; stir often for 6-8 minutes until all ingredients are well combined.
